name: Chocolate Chip Cake
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Linda Worley
Preparation Time: 0:20
1. In a small bowl, toss chocolate chips (and nuts if desired) and mix with 1 tablespoon of cake mix.
2. Blend the rest of the cake mix and pudding in a large mixing bowl.
3. Mix oil, water, vanilla, and eggs together in a separate bowl; add to dry ingredients.
4. Add sour cream. When mixed well, fold in chocolate chips.
5. Bake in a bundt pan at 350°F for 50 minutes.
6. Ice with regular powdered sugar icing to which 2 tablespoons of Hershey's cocoa has been added or with Rocky Road Frosting.
7. Pecans may also be added to the icing (Freezing the chips and tossing them with the dry mix keeps them from settling to the bottom of the pan or melting away into the mix). Very delicious and moist, but not too sweet.
